Bash("C:\\Users\\Jinman Yang\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Python\\Python314\\python.exe" -c "
import OpenDartReader, requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup

dart = OpenDartReader\(''994d8176c72277fd0f195cc374cd2beab2670ba2''\)
reports = dart.list\(''005930'', start=''2024-01-01'', kind=''A''\)
periodic = reports[reports[''report_nm''].str.contains\(''사업보고서|분기보고서|반기보고서''\)]
rcept_no = periodic.iloc[0][''rcept_no'']
docs = dart.sub_docs\(rcept_no\)
sales_doc = docs[docs[''title''].str.contains\(''매출''\)]
doc_url = sales_doc.iloc[0][''url'']
resp = requests.get\(doc_url, headers={''User-Agent'': ''Mozilla/5.0''}, timeout=10\)
resp.encoding = ''utf-8''
soup = BeautifulSoup\(resp.text, ''html.parser''\)

tables = soup.find_all\(''table''\)
# Table 1 \(매출 현황 테이블\)
rows = tables[1].find_all\(''tr''\)
print\(''=== 매출 현황 테이블 \(전체 행\) ===''\)
for i, row in enumerate\(rows\):
    cells = row.find_all\([''td'', ''th'']\)
    texts = [c.get_text\(strip=True\).replace\(chr\(160\), '' ''\) for c in cells]
    print\(f''Row {i}: {texts}''\)
")

Bash("C:\\Users\\Jinman Yang\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Python\\Python314\\python.exe" -c "
import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup

url = ''https://navercomp.wisereport.co.kr/v2/company/c1010001.aspx?cmp_cd=005930''
headers = {''User-Agent'': ''Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36''}
resp = requests.get\(url, headers=headers, timeout=10\)
resp.encoding = ''utf-8''
soup = BeautifulSoup\(resp.text, ''html.parser''\)

# dt 요소 중 투자지표 관련 항목 전부 출력
print\(''=== ALL dt elements ===''\)
for dt in soup.find_all\(''dt''\):
    text = dt.get_text\(strip=True\)
    if any\(k in text for k in [''EPS'', ''BPS'', ''PER'', ''PBR'', ''ROE'', ''배당'', ''52주'', ''KOSPI'', ''WICS'', ''시가'']\):
        print\(f''  [{text}]''\)
print\(\)

# 주가 정보 확인
for elem in soup.find_all\(string=lambda t: t and \(''현재가'' in t or ''종가'' in t or ''시가총액'' in t\)\):
    parent = elem.parent
    print\(f''Price related: [{elem.strip\(\)[:80]}] in <{parent.name}>''\)
")

Bash("C:\\Users\\Jinman Yang\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Python\\Python314\\python.exe" -c "
import OpenDartReader
dart = OpenDartReader\(''994d8176c72277fd0f195cc374cd2beab2670ba2''\)

corp_code = dart.company\(''005930''\)
if isinstance\(corp_code, dict\):
    cc = corp_code.get\(''corp_code'', ''''\)
else:
    cc = corp_code.iloc[0][''corp_code''] if len\(corp_code\) > 0 else ''''

print\(f''corp_code: {cc}''\)

# 주식총수 조회
report_attempts = [
    \(2025, ''11014''\),  # 2025 3Q
    \(2025, ''11012''\),  # 2025 반기
    \(2025, ''11013''\),  # 2025 1Q
    \(2024, ''11011''\),  # 2024 사업보고서
]

for r_year, r_code in report_attempts:
    try:
        stock_df = dart.report\(cc, ''주식총수'', r_year, r_code\)
        if stock_df is not None and len\(stock_df\) > 0:
            print\(f''\\n=== {r_year} / {r_code} ===''\)
            print\(stock_df.columns.tolist\(\)\)
            for _, row in stock_df.iterrows\(\):
                se = row.get\(''se'', ''''\)
                issued = row.get\(''istc_totqy'', ''''\)
                treasury = row.get\(''tesstk_co'', ''''\)
                print\(f''  {se}: issued={issued}, treasury={treasury}''\)
            break
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f''{r_year}/{r_code}: {e}''\)
")

import sys, io

import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\(''E:/07. Claude code/1. Adj. Net Working Capital/순운전자본초과_전종목_20260203_1616.xlsx''\)

for i in range\(1, len\(headers\)+1\):
    col_letter = get_column_letter\(i\)
    cd = ws.column_dimensions.get\(col_letter\)
    if cd:
        print\(f''  Col {i} \({col_letter}\) [{headers[i-1]}]: outlineLevel={cd.outlineLevel}, hidden={cd.hidden}, width={cd.width}''\)
    else:
        print\(f''  Col {i} \({col_letter}\) [{headers[i-1]}]: no dimension set''\)

wb.close\(\)

Bash("C:/Users/Jinman Yang/AppData/Local/Programs/Python/Python312/python.exe" -c "
import sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding=''utf-8''\)
import OpenDartReader

dart = OpenDartReader\(''994d8176c72277fd0f195cc374cd2beab2670ba2''\)

# 2021 Q2 \(반기보고서 = 11012\)
fs21q2 = dart.finstate_all\(''018700'', 2021, reprt_code=''11012''\)
if fs21q2 is not None and len\(fs21q2\) > 0:
    bs = fs21q2[fs21q2[''sj_nm''].str.contains\(''재무상태표'', na=False\)]
    eq = bs[bs[''account_nm''].str.contains\(''자본총계'', na=False\)]
    print\(''=== 2021 Q2 \(반기\) ===''\)
    for _, row in eq.iterrows\(\):
        print\(f''  thstrm={row.get\(""thstrm_amount""\)}, frmtrm={row.get\(""frmtrm_amount""\)}''\)
else:
    print\(''No 2021Q2 data''\)

# 2021 Q1 \(1분기 = 11013\)
fs21q1 = dart.finstate_all\(''018700'', 2021, reprt_code=''11013''\)
if fs21q1 is not None and len\(fs21q1\) > 0:
    bs = fs21q1[fs21q1[''sj_nm''].str.contains\(''재무상태표'', na=False\)]
    eq = bs[bs[''account_nm''].str.contains\(''자본총계'', na=False\)]
    print\(''=== 2021 Q1 ===''\)
    for _, row in eq.iterrows\(\):
        print\(f''  thstrm={row.get\(""thstrm_amount""\)}''\)
else:
    print\(''No 2021Q1 data''\)

# Now check: 225100000000 / 1e8 = 2251
# 67509861060 / 1e8 = 675.1
# So 2021Q4 after restatement: 67509861060 / 1e8 = 675 -> but we see 13!
# What if the 2022 annual report frmtrm replaces 2021Q4?
print\(\)
print\(''=== Restatement check ===''\)
print\(''2022 사보 frmtrm \(전기=2021Q4\):'', 67509861060\)
print\(''  -> / 1e8 ='', round\(67509861060 / 1e8\)\)  # 675
print\(\)
print\(''2021 사보 thstrm \(당기=2021Q4\):'', 67509861060\)
print\(''  -> / 1e8 ='', round\(67509861060 / 1e8\)\)  # 675

# Something else is going on. Let me check OFS
fs2021_ofs = dart.finstate_all\(''018700'', 2021, reprt_code=''11011'', fs_div=''OFS''\)
if fs2021_ofs is not None and len\(fs2021_ofs\) > 0:
    bs = fs2021_ofs[fs2021_ofs[''sj_nm''].str.contains\(''재무상태표'', na=False\)]
    eq = bs[bs[''account_nm''].str.contains\(''자본총계'', na=False\)]
    print\(''=== 2021 OFS 사보 ===''\)
    for _, row in eq.iterrows\(\):
        print\(f''  thstrm={row.get\(""thstrm_amount""\)}''\)
")

Bash("C:/Users/Jinman Yang/AppData/Local/Programs/Python/Python312/python.exe" -c "
import sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding=''utf-8''\)
import OpenDartReader
import pandas as pd

dart = OpenDartReader\(''994d8176c72277fd0f195cc374cd2beab2670ba2''\)

# 2022 사업보고서 - check 자본총계 account_id match
fs2022 = dart.finstate_all\(''018700'', 2022, reprt_code=''11011''\)
bs = fs2022[fs2022[''sj_nm''].str.contains\(''재무상태표'', na=False\)]
eq = bs[bs[''account_id''] == ''ifrs-full_Equity'']
print\(''=== 2022 사보 자본총계 \(account_id=ifrs-full_Equity\) ===''\)
for _, row in eq.iterrows\(\):
    print\(f''  thstrm={row[""thstrm_amount""]}, frmtrm={row[""frmtrm_amount""]}, bfefrmtrm={row.get\(""bfefrmtrm_amount""\)}''\)

# Now simulate restatement: 2021Q4 gets frmtrm_amount from 2022 사보
# The restatement replaces thstrm_amount with frmtrm_amount from newer report
# So 2021Q4 자본총계 thstrm_amount = 67509861060

# But wait - the finstate API shows 2021Q4 = 13, not 675
# So something is converting this differently

# Let me check: what does the 2021Q4 data look like BEFORE restatement?
fs2021q4 = dart.finstate_all\(''018700'', 2021, reprt_code=''11011''\)
bs21 = fs2021q4[fs2021q4[''sj_nm''].str.contains\(''재무상태표'', na=False\)]
eq21 = bs21[bs21[''account_id''] == ''ifrs-full_Equity'']
print\(\)
print\(''=== 2021 사보 자본총계 ===''\)
for _, row in eq21.iterrows\(\):
    print\(f''  thstrm={row[""thstrm_amount""]}, account_nm={row[""account_nm""]}''\)

# Check if there are MULTIPLE rows with same account_id
print\(\)
print\(''=== 2021 사보 ALL ifrs-full_Equity rows ===''\)
all_eq = fs2021q4[fs2021q4[''account_id''] == ''ifrs-full_Equity'']
for _, row in all_eq.iterrows\(\):
    print\(f''  sj={row[""sj_nm""]}, nm={row[""account_nm""]}, thstrm={row[""thstrm_amount""]}''\)
")

Bash("C:/Users/Jinman Yang/AppData/Local/Programs/Python/Python312/python.exe" -c "
import sys, time
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding=''utf-8''\)
import OpenDartReader
import pandas as pd
dart = OpenDartReader\(''994d8176c72277fd0f195cc374cd2beab2670ba2''\)

# Simulate what apply_restatement does for 2023 -> 2021 \(bfefrmtrm\)
# Get 2023Q4 \(source\) and 2021Q4 \(target\)
time.sleep\(0.5\)
q4_2023 = dart.finstate_all\(''006660'', 2023, reprt_code=''11011'', fs_div=''CFS''\)
time.sleep\(1\)
q4_2021 = dart.finstate_all\(''006660'', 2021, reprt_code=''11011'', fs_div=''CFS''\)

print\(''=== OLD METHOD \(account_id only\) ===''\)
rmap_old = {str\(r[''account_id'']\): r[''bfefrmtrm_amount''] for _, r in q4_2023.iterrows\(\)
            if pd.notna\(r.get\(''bfefrmtrm_amount''\)\)}
print\(f''rmap[ifrs-full_Equity] = {rmap_old.get\(""ifrs-full_Equity"", ""NOT FOUND""\)}''\)

print\(\)
print\(''=== NEW METHOD \(sj_nm + account_id\) ===''\)
rmap_new = {\(str\(r[''sj_nm'']\), str\(r[''account_id'']\)\): r[''bfefrmtrm_amount'']
            for _, r in q4_2023.iterrows\(\)
            if pd.notna\(r.get\(''bfefrmtrm_amount''\)\)}
key_bs = \(''재무상태표'', ''ifrs-full_Equity''\)
print\(f''rmap[재무상태표, ifrs-full_Equity] = {rmap_new.get\(key_bs, ""NOT FOUND""\)}''\)

# Check what value the old_df \(2021Q4\) has for 재무상태표 ifrs-full_Equity
bs_row = q4_2021[\(q4_2021[''account_id''] == ''ifrs-full_Equity''\) & \(q4_2021[''sj_nm''] == ''재무상태표''\)]
print\(f''2021Q4 재무상태표 Equity thstrm_amount = {bs_row[""thstrm_amount""].values[0] if len\(bs_row\) > 0 else ""NOT FOUND""} ''\)

# Count how many 자본변동표 rows for this account
scv_keys = [k for k in rmap_new.keys\(\) if k[0] == ''자본변동표'' and k[1] == ''ifrs-full_Equity'']
print\(f''자본변동표 ifrs-full_Equity keys in rmap_new: {len\(scv_keys\)}''\)
for k in scv_keys:
    print\(f''  {k} = {rmap_new[k]}''\)
")

Bash("C:/Users/Jinman Yang/AppData/Local/Programs/Python/Python312/python.exe" -c "
import json, sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding=''utf-8''\)

for code, name in [\(''036190'', ''금화피에시스''\), \(''005820'', ''원림''\)]:
    path = f''E:/07. Claude code/2. Financial Statements/tmp_verify_{code}.json''
    with open\(path, ''r'', encoding=''utf-8''\) as f:
        data = json.load\(f\)
    if ''error'' in data:
        print\(f''{name}\({code}\): ERROR - {data[""error""]}''\)
        continue
    bs = data[''statements''].get\(''재무상태표''\)
    if not bs:
        print\(f''{name}\({code}\): No 재무상태표''\)
        continue
    accts = bs[''accounts'']
    bs_data = bs[''data'']
    
    # Find 자본총계
    eq_idx = None
    for i, a in enumerate\(accts\):
        if ''자본총계'' in a.get\(''name'', ''''\) and a.get\(''is_header'', False\):
            eq_idx = i
            break
    if eq_idx is None:
        # try non-header
        for i, a in enumerate\(accts\):
            if ''자본총계'' in a.get\(''name'', ''''\):
                eq_idx = i
                break
    
    if eq_idx is None:
        print\(f''{name}\({code}\): 자본총계 not found''\)
        continue
    
    print\(f''=== {name} \({code}\) 자본총계 Q4 ===''\)
    for q in sorted\(bs_data.keys\(\)\):
        if ''Q4'' in q:
            vals = bs_data[q]
            v = vals[eq_idx] if eq_idx < len\(vals\) else ''N/A''
            print\(f''  {q}: {v}''\)
    print\(\)
")
